code:
---
config:
  logLevel: 'debug'
  theme: 'base'
---
gitGraph
    %% Step 1: Initial state: main branch with v1.0.0 tag
    commit id: "1.0.0" tag: "v1.0.0"

    %% Step 2: Create release/1 from main for next release preparation
    branch release/1 order: 2
    checkout release/1
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.1"
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.2"

    %% Step 3: Create release/2 from the second commit of release/1 (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
    %% release/1 at this point: 1.0.1-rc.1.post.2, so release/2 continues from there
    checkout release/1
    branch release/2 order: 1
    checkout release/2
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.2.post.3"

    %% Step 4: Go back to release/1 and add the problematic third commit (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
    checkout release/1
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.3" tag: "issues found"

    %% Step 5: release/2 completes preparation successfully
    checkout release/2
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.2.post.4"

    %% Step 6: Merge release/2 to main and release v1.1.0
    checkout main
    merge release/2 id: "1.1.0" tag: "v1.1.0"
repo_description: Automatic versioning for every commit - Generate semantic versions from any commit across all branches, or dirty working directory, with seamless pre-release handling and flexible format support for a

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech HIPAA Vault项目梳理一下版本发布流程。目前main分支上已经有v1.0.0的正式版本了，现在准备开始下一个迭代。我想先开一条release/1分支来做1.0.1的准备工作，你觉得呢？
明白了，从main切出release/1，order设为2。然后在这条分支上打两个rc包：1.0.1-rc.1.post.1和1.0.1-rc.1.post.2。这样release/1的前两个commit就定下来了。
对。不过这里有个新情况——EMR Sync模块需要紧急跟进，但HIPAA Vault的合规检查还没做完。我打算从release/1的第二个commit再拉一条release/2分支，让HIPAA Vault的准备工作独立进行，order可以设为1让它显示在左边。
好的，release/2从release/1的第二个commit分出，order设为1。然后checkout到release/2，打commit 1.0.1-rc.2.post.3。这样两条发布线就并行起来了。
现在回到release/1，EMR Sync那边有个问题——第三个commit 1.0.1-rc.1.post.3测出了兼容性问题，需要标记一下。我们给它打个"issues found"的标签，方便后续回溯。
收到，切回release/1，添加post.3的commit并打上issues found标签。那release/2这边呢，HIPAA Vault的合规检查应该能正常走完吧？
是的，release/2没问题，继续加第四个commit 1.0.1-rc.2.post.4完成准备工作。然后直接merge回main，发布正式的v1.1.0版本。EMR Sync的问题等修好了再跟下个版本。
完成。checkout到main，把release/2 merge进来，生成commit 1.1.0并打上v1.1.0标签。整个流程图已经反映了release/2优先上线、release/1因EMR Sync问题暂缓的实际情况。
